ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., cryptocurrency, stock, forex) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., Coinbase, NYSE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the exchange belongs to */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., Bitcoin, Apple Stock) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the instrument belongs to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange the instrument is traded on */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., cryptocurrency, stock, forex) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the price data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument traded at the given timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the trade was executed on */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fee paid for the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the order was placed on */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., limit, market) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, closed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_orders" (
  "user_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_orders_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trades" (
  "user_trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user trade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_book" (
  "order_book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order book record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the order book belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the order book */,
  "bid_price" TEXT /* Current bid price for the instrument */,
  "ask_price" TEXT /* Current ask price for the instrument */,
  "bid_quantity" INTEGER /* Current bid quantity for the instrument */,
  "ask_quantity" INTEGER /* Current ask quantity for the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order book record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order book record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_book_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "dashboard_widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget is added to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the widget is for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the model is for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the prediction is for */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the prediction */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predicted value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
